title: Obrolan Cuaca
opening: Wah, Jakarta lagi panas-panasnya nih, gerah sekali rasanya. Kamu di sana bagaimana cuacanya? Semoga tidak sampai bikin sumpek, ya?

t1.prompt: Wah, Jakarta lagi panas-panasnya nih, gerah sekali rasanya. Kamu di sana bagaimana cuacanya? Semoga tidak sampai bikin sumpek, ya?
t1.promptTranslation: Wow, Jakarta is super hot right now, it feels really muggy. How's the weather where you are? Hope it's not making you feel too stuffy/uncomfortable (sum-pèk), ya?

t2.prompt: Iya ya, memang lagi musim kemarau parah sepertinya. Sampai-sampai sawah di kampung saya banyak yang kekeringan. Ada rencana apa di cuaca terik begini?
t2.promptTranslation: Yes, it really seems to be a severe dry season. Even many rice fields in my village are drying up. Any plans in this scorching (te-rìk) weather?

t3.prompt: Oh, enak dong kalau di sana hujan, pasti suasananya lebih adem. Tapi, kalau hujannya nggak berhenti-henti, suka bikin rencana buyar juga, ya? Apalagi kalau banjir.
t3.promptTranslation: Oh, that's nice then if it's raining there, the atmosphere must be cooler. But if the rain doesn't stop, it often ruins (bu-yar) plans too, right? Especially if there's flooding.

t4.prompt: Betul sekali, paling enak memang berteduh sambil menikmati secangkir kopi atau teh hangat. Kadang cuaca ekstrem begini memang bikin kita mesti lebih hati-hati menjaga kesehatan.
t4.promptTranslation: That's very true, it's best to shelter indoors while enjoying a cup of coffee or warm tea. Sometimes extreme weather like this really makes us have to be more careful about our health.

t5.prompt: Hati-hati, ya, jangan sampai dehidrasi atau malah terserang flu karena perubahan cuaca yang drastis. Musim pancaroba memang rentan sekali.
t5.promptTranslation: Be careful, ya, don't get dehydrated or even catch a flu due to drastic weather changes. The transitional season (pan-ca-ro-ba) is indeed very vulnerable.

t6.prompt: Ah, senangnya kalau bisa menikmati suasana hujan atau hawa sejuk. Kadang momen seperti itu yang bikin kita bersyukur, ya. Paling pas kalau sambil baca buku atau dengar musik.
t6.promptTranslation: Ah, it's lovely to be able to enjoy the rainy atmosphere or cool air. Sometimes moments like that make us grateful, right? It's perfect if you're reading a book or listening to music at the same time.

t-repeat.prompt: Maaf, bisa diulang? Saya kurang menangkap maksudmu tadi.
t-repeat.promptTranslation: Sorry, could you repeat that? I didn't quite catch what you meant.

t-end.prompt: Oke deh, kalau begitu saya pamit dulu, ya. Semoga harimu menyenangkan dan tetap jaga kesehatan!
t-end.promptTranslation: Alright then, I'll take my leave now. Hope you have a pleasant day and stay healthy!
